meaning: adj.[解]硬(脑)膜上的,硬脑膜外的
examples: Some mothers choose to have an epidural when giving birth.
Will I need an epidural (and when can I have one)?
Even if you have an epidural, sitting, side lying, or rocking are options available to you.
The 34-year-old Youkilis was given an epidural injection Tuesday and told to stay home and rest.
In labor that snowy January morning, the nurse entered my delivery room to discuss my epidural.
